'''âth-y-h-sh''' ('''kathayheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turbocharge|turbocharge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turbocharge|turbocharge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-y-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathayheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithayheshoko|thithayheshoko]] || [[word:jithayheshoko|jithayheshoko]] || [[word:shithayheshoko|shithayheshoko]] || [[word:kithayheshoko|kithayheshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
